product.description: Born in 1984, the brand Vinda has striven to satisfy people’s needs for quality products. Vinda, in 1989 for the first time in the country, produced napkin with 100% imported virgin wood pulp and since then continues to provide quality household paper products for Chinese consumers. By now, the brand Vinda has expanded its assortment to not only include cored rolls but also softpack, coredless rolls and wet wipes. Vinda brand currently manages 6 categories and owns best selling lines such as the Ultra-strong line and Classic Blue line. Facial tissue and rolls of Vinda always make it to the top 3 in market share, and the latter for consecutive 9 years have ranked the 1st in sales volume.

metaData.Preparation:
1. Open the pack by peeling the resealable adhesive label
2. Pull out a piece of natural plant-based surface sheet and reseal label
3. Wipe directly on usage areas, and leave it to dry
4. Dispose the used sheet
metaData.Storage Information: Avoid exposure of Wipes to direct sunlight

product.description: This is for external use only. Avoid contact with eyes and mucous membrane. If solution comes in contact with the eyes, wash out promptly and thoroughly with water. Skin irritation is uncommon but should reaction occur discontinue use immediately. This is good for accidental stains only. Do not scrub the wipe heavily on the cloth as it may cause discoloration. In rare cases, Stain Remover content may cause discoloration to certain fabrics. Please check your fabric quality before using.

metaData.Key Information:
Zappy Lifestyle Instant Stain Remover Wipes contain a foaming water soluble stain remover formulated to remove accidental stains which includes coffee, soda, beverages, milk, tea, sauces stain and even mud from carpets. Pocket size and easy to carry around. Each box contains 6 individually packed sachets.

- Removes stubborn stains with minimal ring marks and residue

- For instant removal of accidental stains on cloths and carpets

- For superficial stains on hard surfaces
